title: Google Ads Gambling Policy Update Effective July 16, 2025
summary: Google Ads enforces stricter pre-approvals for gambling ad creatives and landing pages from July 16, 2025, targeting age restrictions (18+) and misleading content in iGaming, impacting sports betting operators globally.

title: Google Updates Gambling Ad Policy April 14, 2025
summary: Google's gambling and games ad policy update introduces stricter rules effective April 14, 2025, reshaping iGaming marketing compliance for sports betting advertisers.

title: Google Permits Missouri Sports Betting Ads from August 15, 2025
summary: Google's policy allows sports betting ads from Missouri-licensed operators starting August 15, 2025, specific to state-regulated iGaming markets.

title: FIFA Bans Gambling Ads at 2026 World Cup Venues
summary: FIFA enforces a 'clean venue' policy banning all gambling advertisements, including sports betting, at 2026 World Cup stadiums to remove non-sponsor branding.

title: Google Ads Betting Rules Shift After Australia Crackdown April 2026
summary: Australia's stringent gambling promotion limits, effective 2026, force Google Ads to reshape betting rules, increasing compliance for sports betting in iGaming.

title: Australian Reforms Pressure Google Ads Betting Compliance March 2026
summary: Australian reforms in March 2026 heighten compliance demands on Google Ads for betting ads, focusing on public health and youth protection in sports betting.

title: Expansion of Advertising Restrictions Following UK Regulations in 2026
summary: More markets adopt updated UK gambling regulations in 2026, imposing time-based ad bans and athlete exclusions on sports betting operators in iGaming.

title: Netherlands Pushes for Google Ads Betting Campaign Ban 2026
summary: Opposition in Netherlands seeks total ban on Google Ads betting campaigns in 2026 amid rising gambling issues, affecting sports betting affiliates.
